case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. LUIS R DELTORRE et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-15, INCLUSIVE
WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,921.50 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 5, 2013 TO CONTACT THE SHERIFF'S DEPT. OF LOS ANGELES FOR A SHERIFF PACKET. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, AS TO DEFENDANT DELTORRE, LUIS R

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. AT THE HEARING ON JUNE 28, 2013, JUDGMENT DEBTOR PROVIDED DOCUMENTS WHICH SHOWN THAT HIS BANK OF AMERICA CHECKING ACCOUNT ENDING IN 05330 IS A DEPOSIT ACCOUNT WITHIN THE MEANING OF CCP 704.080. IN ADDITION, THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT HAS INDICATED THAT IT IS CURRENTLY NOT HOLDING ANY MONEY FOR THIS ACCOUNT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELTORRE, LUIS R $7,578.73 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,578.73, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - LUIS DE LA TORRE, TEL. NO. 572-9930, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is granted. At the hearing on June 28, 2013, judgment debtor provided documents which shown that his Bank of America checking account ending in 05330 is a deposit account within the meaning of CCP 704.080. In addition, the Sheriff's Department has indicated that it is currently not holding any money for this account. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Continued To Jul-05-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - LUIS R. DELTORRE, TEL. NO. 572-9930, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is continued to July 5, 2013 to contact the Sheriff's Dept. of Los Angeles for a Sheriff Packet. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)
